name: Arena Warrior
short_description: Jump, Slide and Wallride your way across a multitude of arenas fighting off waves of enemies using different weapons and movement equipment to survive. Fight epic bosses and gain new abilities to strengthen your run in this fast past rouge-like arena fighter.
detailed_description: This game has 6 different unique arenas with there own enemies and bosses. Fight through waves of grunt soldiers to summon the big boss at the end of each area. Acquire abilities through fighting bosses or get lucky with the roll machine. Pick between 6 different weapons and 3 movement equipment to play how you want to play.
about_the_game: This game has 6 different unique arenas with there own enemies and bosses. Fight through waves of grunt soldiers to summon the big boss at the end of each area. Acquire abilities through fighting bosses or get lucky with the roll machine. Pick between 6 different weapons and 3 movement equipment to play how you want to play.
